name: Bimal Rajappan
comment: Amazing instructor! Passed first time. Very calm and patient throughout.

name: Sherin Zia
comment: Excellent teaching style. Helped me build confidence quickly in both manual and automatic driving.

name: Devika Shaker
comment: Friendly and professional. Lessons were structured perfectly for my learning pace.

name: Nicolas Nanayakkra
comment: Highly recommend! Clear instructions and great knowledge of test routes in Watford.

name: Chinthaka
comment: I was very nervous at first, but the lessons made me feel completely comfortable and confident.

name: Merriam
comment: Great experience. Flexible scheduling and very supportive instructor.
